queries: ("Hypertension"[Mesh] OR hypertens*[tiab] OR "high blood pressure"[tiab] OR "arterial hypertension"[tiab]) AND ("Biofeedback, Psychology"[Mesh] OR biofeedback[tiab] OR "bio-feedback"[tiab] OR "heart rate variability biofeedback"[tiab] OR ("heart rate variability"[tiab] AND biofeedback[tiab]) OR "HRV biofeedback"[tiab] OR "HRV-biofeedback"[tiab] OR "respiratory biofeedback"[tiab] OR "breathing biofeedback"[tiab] OR "thermal biofeedback"[tiab] OR "skin temperature biofeedback"[tiab] OR "electromyography biofeedback"[tiab] OR "EMG biofeedback"[tiab] OR "electrodermal biofeedback"[tiab] OR "skin conductance biofeedback"[tiab] OR "galvanic skin response biofeedback"[tiab] OR "coherence training"[tiab] OR "resonance frequency breathing"[tiab] OR "paced breathing"[tiab])

(("Hypertension"[Mesh] OR hypertens*[tiab] OR "high blood pressure"[tiab]) AND ("Biofeedback, Psychology"[Mesh] OR biofeedback[tiab] OR "HRV biofeedback"[tiab] OR "heart rate variability biofeedback"[tiab] OR "thermal biofeedback"[tiab] OR "EMG biofeedback"[tiab] OR "respiratory biofeedback"[tiab])) AND ("Blood Pressure"[Mesh] OR "blood pressure"[tiab] OR "systolic blood pressure"[tiab] OR "diastolic blood pressure"[tiab] OR systolic[tiab] OR diastolic[tiab] OR SBP[tiab] OR DBP[tiab] OR "ambulatory blood pressure"[tiab] OR ABPM[tiab])

(("Hypertension"[Mesh] OR hypertens*[tiab] OR "high blood pressure"[tiab]) AND ("Biofeedback, Psychology"[Mesh] OR biofeedback[tiab] OR "HRV biofeedback"[tiab] OR "heart rate variability biofeedback"[tiab] OR "paced breathing"[tiab] OR "resonance frequency"[tiab])) AND (randomized controlled trial[pt] OR controlled clinical trial[pt] OR randomized[tiab] OR randomised[tiab] OR randomly[tiab] OR trial[tiab] OR placebo[tiab] OR "usual care"[tiab] OR control*[tiab]) NOT (animals[mh] NOT humans[mh])

(("Heart Rate Variability"[Mesh] OR "heart rate variability"[tiab] OR HRV[tiab]) AND (biofeedback[tiab] OR "Biofeedback, Psychology"[Mesh] OR "bio-feedback"[tiab] OR "coherence training"[tiab] OR "resonance frequency"[tiab])) AND (("Hypertension"[Mesh] OR hypertens*[tiab] OR "high blood pressure"[tiab]) OR ("Blood Pressure"[Mesh] OR "blood pressure"[tiab] OR SBP[tiab] OR DBP[tiab] OR "ambulatory blood pressure"[tiab]))

("Hypertension/therapy"[Mesh] OR "Hypertension/physiopathology"[Mesh]) AND ("Biofeedback, Psychology/therapy"[Mesh] OR "Biofeedback, Psychology/methods"[Mesh]) AND ("Blood Pressure"[Mesh] OR "Blood Pressure/physiology"[Mesh])

inclusion_criteria: Population: Human participants diagnosed with hypertension (any stage/setting).

Intervention: Biofeedback-based therapy (e.g., heart rate variability/respiratory, EMG, skin temperature, or multimodal biofeedback) that provides real-time physiological feedback and is a primary component of the intervention.

Design/comparator: Randomized or nonrandomized controlled studies with a comparator not receiving active biofeedback (e.g., usual care, waitlist, attention/health education control, sham biofeedback, or no intervention).
Outcomes: Report changes in systolic and/or diastolic blood pressure (clinic, home, or ambulatory) pre–post and/or between groups.
exclusion_criteria: Study design without a comparator (single-arm, case reports/series), qualitative studies, protocols, conference abstracts without sufficient data, or reviews/editorials.
Population focused on pregnancy-related hypertension (e.g., preeclampsia) or immediate post–acute cardiovascular events/hypertensive emergencies.

Interventions lacking a biofeedback component (e.g., relaxation/mindfulness or self-monitoring only) or multicomponent programs where the specific effect of biofeedback cannot be isolated (i.e., comparator does not match all non-biofeedback components).
Do not report systolic or diastolic blood pressure outcomes (report only surrogate outcomes such as HRV indices without BP).
screening_criteria.description: Selects controlled studies of biofeedback interventions versus non-biofeedback comparators in patients with hypertension that report blood pressure outcomes.

included_articles.title: Psychological treatment of essential hypertension: a controlled comparison of meditation and meditation plus biofeedback.
Evaluation of biofeedback in the treatment of borderline essential hypertension.
Blood pressure biofeedback exerts intermediate-term effects on blood pressure and pressure reactivity in individuals with mild hypertension: a randomized controlled study.
Behavioral treatment of essential hypertension: a comparison between cognitive therapy and biofeedback of heart rate.
Home relaxation techniques for essential hypertension.
Device-guided breathing as treatment for hypertension in type 2 diabetes mellitus: a randomized, double-blind, sham-controlled trial.
Controlled evaluation of thermal biofeedback in treatment of elevated blood pressure in unmedicated mild hypertension.
The effect of biofeedback-assisted relaxation training on blood pressure and selected biochemical parameters in patients with essential hypertension.
Placebo-controlled biofeedback blood pressure effect in hypertensive humans.
The effect of home training with direct blood pressure biofeedback of hypertensives: a placebo-controlled study.
Effects of long term device-guided slow breathing on sympathetic nervous activity in hypertensive patients: a randomized open-label clinical trial.
